element_introduction_order.mastery_context: primary offensive tool for entire game
combining items to create rifle, bazooka, launcher, mortar variants

element_introduction_order.element: Ammunition types (glue, snow, light bulbs, sound waves, coals)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: selecting ammunition type to match tactical needs and gun type
combat encounters against Wet Bandits in constrained spaces
filling meter to incapacitate Bandits and save house
race condition: must fill Pain Meter before Bandits fill Robbery Meter
consequence system: failed houses cannot be revisited

typical_relief_triggers: successfully filling Pain Meter to save house
Bandits leave in van after house completion
time passing with houses remaining protected
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: cyclical tension: sled navigation (low tension) interrupted by sudden house combat encounters (high tension), with racing dual-meter pressure during each confrontation

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: multiple houses available for protection; player chooses which to defend

difficulty_curve.early_game: single house encounters with basic BB gun and straightforward combat
difficulty_curve.mid_game: multiple houses vulnerable simultaneously; weapon crafting required to fill Pain Meters efficiently
difficulty_curve.late_game: time pressure increases on higher difficulties (40 minutes vs 20); all houses approaching threat
notable_spikes: first Bandit house entry (transition from exploration to time-pressure combat)
multiple house activations requiring rapid weapon switching and ammunition management
endgame scenario with limited unprotected houses remaining

notable_level_patterns.description: During each house encounter, Pain Meter (player progress) races against Robbery Meter (enemy progress). Victory requires filling Pain Meter before Robbery Meter completes. Creates temporal pressure within each spatial encounter.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: any house interior during active Bandit robbery

notable_level_patterns.description: Top-down sled navigation between houses creates macro-level spatial puzzle: Kevin must anticipate which houses Bandits will target and position himself accordingly. Failed houses become permanently flooded, reducing available targets.
Different gun types and ammunition combinations provide varying effectiveness. Player must explore house interiors to discover and craft appropriate weapon combinations for upcoming encounters.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: any house interior exploration phase before Bandit arrival
